# ThroughPoint Marketing

> ThroughPoint Marketing helps local businesses improve AI readiness, digital trust signals, visibility, authority, and customer experience so they can be found by AI and chosen by customers.

## Services

- Personalized Signal Scan: A digital footprint audit across trust, authority, visibility, expertise, proof, and customer experience signals.
- AI readiness consulting for local businesses including dental practices, MedSpas, health and wellness, local services, and professional services.

## Contact

- Website: https://throughpointmarketing.com
- Email: vlad.tsigler@throughpointmarketing.com
- Request a Signal Scan: https://throughpointmarketing.com/#signal-form

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://throughpointmarketing.com/
- Signal Scan overview: https://throughpointmarketing.com/#signal-scan
- FAQs: https://throughpointmarketing.com/#faq
